text: that sort of defies regular analysis of, you know, political systems. There's something else at work.

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: And I started pulling at the threads of it. And I think one of the fascinating things that happened,

text: I was starting to research Nazi occultism, because that was going to be a chapter of Sinister Forces.

text: doing that? So I started, you know, looking at that and I wound up at the National Archives in D.C.

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: And I rented, you know, a room in a low-cost kind of hotel off DuPont Circle. And I'm in the room and

text: I bring my suitcase in and I look up on the wall and somebody had left this huge poster of, you know,

text: the eye in the pyramid, you know, on top of the triangle of the pyramid. You know, this Illuminati

text: symbol was like hanging there, you know, in the room where I'm starting to do this research. I'm

text: thinking, this is a little bit too on the nose, you know. So one thing led to another and it made

text: me realize that there was something else going on, that the, what we were learning about Watergate was

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: only really the tip of the iceberg. If you start pulling at the people who were involved, like E.

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: Howard Hunt, right? Famous guy, former CIA officer, the action officer basically in charge of the

text: the Bay of Pigs operation, right? So he was down in Miami when all that was going on,

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: trying to organize this, this invasion that Kennedy eventually said, no, we're not going

text: to give you air support. You guys are freaking nuts, right? Pull back. Don't do this stuff.

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: But they ignored him, right? Did all this thing. E. Howard Hunt wrote at least three occult novels.

text: Really? Yeah. And he lives on a place called Witch's Island.

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: What? So I'm thinking, well, wait a minute here, right? Let me read the novels. Maybe there's

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: something there. Who does that, right? I just said, I want to read these novels. And oh my God,

text: it's an attack on the Kennedys, the Kennedys as Satan worshipers, thinly veiled kind of a story about

text: that. You know, the vitriol that he had for the Kennedys over Bay of Pigs was palpable in this.

text: And he made them, you know, Satan worshipers and stuff. It was really cool. So I said, I got to pay

text: attention to Howard Hunt a little bit more closely. Okay. Years go by. It's now 1979, 1980. And I get a job.

text: I'm working for a living as a regular human being, you know. So I get a job in this strange company in

text: Queens, New York, within walking distance of where I was living, which made it, you know, nice. I could

text: Okay. So this guy is working there.

text: What was the front?

text: Well, the front was Robert Mullen Corporation. It was like a kind of a Mormon operation in D.C. that

text: was supposedly a publicity, public relations firm. But E. Howard Hunt had his official office there,

text: even though he was no longer, quote unquote, CIA, but he was operating here. He was part of the

text: plumbers at that time. So Gordon Liddy, everybody was one big happy family. This guy had the office

text: next to him. Also CIA, also operating as a front, except this guy was based either in Brazil for a

text: long time or in Singapore. Right. So all these things, I mean, I'm right there, right next to the

text: guy who knows personally E. Howard Hunt. And I'm researching E. Howard Hunt. And he tells me his

text: name, Arthur Hochberg. I guess I can tell his name now because I've talked about it. I printed it.

text: And I went home after he started telling me his whole life story. He's going into CIA. He's going

text: into this. He's going into that. The language is because we both spoke a little Mandarin. He spoke

text: possible. Like if you had been a journalist and you were desperately looking for this guy, you

text: wouldn't have found him. Yeah. Right. But here I am next to him and he's like driving me home in his

text: Yes. So this would happen to me all the time.

text: There's something that happens, I think, when you set your attention on something that is somehow

text: entropy reducing. Exactly. And it attracts more and more of that thing into your life. And it's hard

text: Right. Since the beginning, everybody has thought that, right, because of Bay of Pigs. There was

text: I'm sure there is, right? Who you can take to court over this? I'm not sure.

text: Can I weave something together? And I don't know if this is the case, but like,

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: you know, Nixon was head of the 5412 Commission under Eisenhower, and he used to task Howard Hughes

text: they went by different names, Alpha 66, and, you know, Operation Mongoose had something to do with

text: this. And so he created that originally to take out Castro and Che Guevara. But that sort of,

text: you know, didn't end up happening, obviously, at the Bay of Pigs. JFK takes over from Eisenhower.

text: And the narrative I've heard is that JFK, you know, fires Dulles. Dulles is sort of licking his

text: But everybody knows everybody else. The problem that I have is that it gets tighter and tighter

text: everybody that represents the blue-blooded Brahmins of American society, old money people,

text: were at a freaking seance, right? In the woods, in Maine on New Year's Eve. These people don't do

text: New Year's Eve that way normally, right? There's big parties and there's champagne and there's God

text: knows what. In this case, they're all sitting around a seance table with Andrea Pujaric. And one of them

text: is the guy who was the inventor of the Bell helicopter, right?

text: Is that Arthur Young?

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: Arthur Young. So Arthur Young is there with his wife. His wife is Ruth Forbes Payne Young,

text: right? She had a lot of names. She was excessively nomenclatured. And so you have,

text: you know, Ruth Forbes Payne Young. She's a Forbes. She was married to a George Payne,

text: Lyman Payne, and also married to Arthur Young. So she had all of these pedigrees all mixed in

text: together. And she was the best friend of, I think her name was Mary Douglas, if I'm not mistaken,

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: who was the paramour of Alan Dulles. So Alan Dulles, which keeps coming up in these conversations,

text: his girlfriend is the best friend of Ruth Young, married to Arthur Young. So already there's this

text: weird connection, right? And when I say best friends, I mean, they told each other everything,

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: that kind of, it wasn't like a casual, you know, thing. So they were, they were best friends. And

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: then you had a DuPont, you had an Astor, you had all of these people at the seance, and they're

text: that Andrea Pujaric puts to him to see if he's really talking to a spiritual force. And this guy

text: is answering correctly, solving mathematical equations.

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: So then, and this guy evidently materializes out of the clear blue sky, little threads, one for each of

text: the members of this group. They're supposed to wrap around their wrist, makes them Brahmins, like actual

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: Brahmins in the Indian sense. But they're Brahmins assigned to this exalted rank, this elite status

text: by these nine forces that are spinning somehow above them, which later become identified as residents

text: of a UFO in low Earth orbit. The same one that is later then being contacted by Uri Geller,

text: who was then discovered by Buharic, brought to the United States to be tested. It just, it gets

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: incestuous. But Ruth and Arthur, they have a daughter who's also Ruth. Her name is Ruth Payne.

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: She lives in Texas, by the way. And she's studying Russian. She's fascinated by the Russian language.

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: She's a Quaker who wants to study Russian. Don't think she ever managed it in her life, but at that

transcript_title: Cia Historian Aliens Are Controlling Hum
text: moment, she wanted to study Russian. And in her home, she opens her door to some refugees,
